scenes.title: The SaaS Metrics That Actually Matter
scenes.narration: Most founders track the wrong numbers. Here are the five metrics that predict sustainable growth.

scenes.title: Why Most Metrics Lie
scenes.narration: Vanity metrics feel good but tell you nothing about whether your product is actually working.

scenes.title: The Five That Matter
scenes.narration: Focus on these and you will always know the health of your business.

features.label: Net Retention
features.description: Revenue kept + expanded from existing customers

features.label: Time to Value
features.description: How fast users reach their first success moment

features.label: CAC Payback
features.description: Months to recover customer acquisition cost

features.label: NPS Trend
features.description: Are customers getting happier over time?

scenes.title: Key Benchmarks
scenes.narration: Here is what good looks like for each metric at the seed and Series A stage.

scenes.title: How to Get There
scenes.narration: A repeatable process for improving your core metrics every quarter.

dataPoints.label: Measure
dataPoints.description: Instrument your product for accurate data

dataPoints.label: Diagnose
dataPoints.description: Identify the biggest drag on each metric

dataPoints.label: Experiment
dataPoints.description: Run focused A/B tests on the bottleneck

dataPoints.label: Ship
dataPoints.description: Productise what works, cut what doesn't

scenes.title: Growth vs Retention
scenes.narration: New acquisition and retention are equally important — but most teams only optimise one.

dataPoints.label: left
dataPoints.title: High CAC, leaky bucket
dataPoints.description: Pouring water into a broken cup.

dataPoints.label: right
dataPoints.title: Compound growth engine
dataPoints.description: Every customer makes the next one cheaper.

layoutProps.verdict: Balance both — but fix retention first

scenes.title: Track It In Code
scenes.narration: Here is a simple function to calculate net revenue retention from your billing data.

scenes.title: The Bottom Line
scenes.narration: Retention is the most honest signal your product can send you.

layoutProps.title: Retention is the most honest signal your product can send you.
layoutProps.subtitle: Fix it before you scale.
